title: Self-Hosted AI: Why It Matters
description: Understand the privacy, control, and customization advantages of running your own AI gateway.
content_mdx:
# Self-Hosted AI: Why It Matters

Most people use AI through cloud services — ChatGPT, Claude.ai, Gemini. These are convenient but come with significant tradeoffs.

Self-hosted AI changes the equation entirely.

## The Cloud AI Problem

When you use a cloud AI service, here's what actually happens:

- Every message you send is stored on their servers
- Your conversations may be used to train future models
- Your data is subject to their privacy policy (which can change)
- You're locked into their pricing and rate limits
- If they go down, you lose access
- Your agent's personality is limited to their interface

## What Self-Hosting Changes

**Privacy by default.** Your conversations never leave your machine (except to call the AI API, which you control). No company is reading your chats with your agent.

**Complete control.** You decide:
- Which AI model powers your agent
- What personality your agent has
- What channels it's available on
- What tools and capabilities it has
- Who can interact with it

**Cost efficiency.** You pay per token to the AI provider (like Anthropic or OpenAI), not a subscription. For moderate use, this is dramatically cheaper.

**24/7 availability.** Your gateway runs constantly. No session timeouts, no "memory resets," no starting fresh every conversation.

## The OpenClaw Architecture

```
[Your Machine]
    ├── OpenClaw Gateway (always running)
    ├── Your Agent Config (SOUL.md, USER.md)
    ├── Memory System (MEMORY.md, daily notes)
    └── Skills (custom capabilities)
         ↕
[API Calls]
    ├── Anthropic API (Claude)
    ├── OpenAI API (GPT)
    └── Any AI provider
         ↕  
[Connected Channels]
    ├── Telegram
    ├── Discord
    ├── WhatsApp
    └── 17+ more
```

## Real Privacy Benefits

Let's make this concrete. With OpenClaw, you can:

- Have your agent manage your finances — and those conversations stay private
- Discuss sensitive work projects without worrying about corporate data policies
- Build an agent that knows deeply personal context about your life
- Let your agent access your local files and calendar — no cloud sync required

## The Cost Math

Cloud AI services often cost $20/month. With OpenClaw using the Anthropic API:

- Claude Haiku (fast, efficient): ~$0.25 per million input tokens
- Average conversation message: ~500 tokens
- That's $0.000125 per message
- At 100 messages/day: $0.375/month

For most users, self-hosted AI costs less than $5/month in API fees.

## Privacy vs. Convenience Tradeoff

Self-hosting does require initial setup. That's why ClawMaster exists — to make that setup fast and painless.

Once it's running? Pure upside. You never have to think about it again.

## Ready to Install?

In the next module, we'll install OpenClaw on your machine. The process takes about 10-15 minutes and you'll have a working gateway by the end.
